popularStory.headline: Kloosterrade (Rolduc)
popularStory.description: In 1104, a young priest by the name of Ailbertus of Antoing founded an Augustinian abbey in the Land of Rode, near the river Wurm. The abbey was called Kloosterrade, which later became 's-Hertogenrade …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
BIO:  heiress of Landes Rode
** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/FRANCONIA%20(LOWER%20RHINE).htm#_Toc214167734
MATHILDE von Saffenberg (-2 Jan [1145/46]).  Her parentage and marriage are confirmed by a charter dated 1147 under which her husband confirmed the possessions of the abbey of Rolduc, among which his donation "in obitu…coniugis suæ dominæ Mathildis" which refers to donations by "socer eius", which are in turn recited earlier in the same document as donations of Adolf Graf von Saffenberg[556].  This is supported by the charter dated 1171 under which her son "Henricus filius domini Henrici filii ducis Walerami de Lymburg" donated property, inherited by him and "sorore nostra domina Margareta ducissa de Lovanio…atque domino Godefrido marito eius duce de Lovanio", to Rolduc abbey and names "domino Herimanno, avunculo nostro, comite de Saphinberg"[557].  Heiress of the seigneurie de Rolduc.  The Chronicle of Rolduc records 

the death of Mathilde six years before the death of her mother-in-law Jutta, which it dates to 24 Jun 1151[558].  
m (1136) as his first wife, HENDRIK Graaf van Limburg, son of WALRAM [II] Graaf van Limburg, Duke of Lower Lotharingia & his wife Jutta van Wassenburg (-Rome Aug 1167).  Duke of Limburg 1140.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Saffenberg於1105年1月1日出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫雷吉隆斯其可 可爾時，她的父親Adolf I. von Saffenberg18歲，母親Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz9歲。她於1136年與Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen在比利時利艾利布格結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1146年1月7日在荷蘭利包格享年41歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Saffenberg was born on 1 January 1105, in Cologne Region, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Adolf I. von Saffenberg, was 18 and her mother, Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz, was 9. She married Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen in 1136, in Limbourg, Liège, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 7 January 1146, in Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Saffenberg est née le 1 janvier 1105, à Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Adolf I. von Saffenberg, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen en 1136, à Limbourg, Liège, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1146, à Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Saffenberg am 1. Januar 1105 in Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adolf I. von Saffenberg 18 und ihre Mutter Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz 9. Sie hat 1136 in Limbourg, Lüttich, Belgien Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1146 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Limburg, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Saffenberg è nata il il 1 gennaio 1105 nel Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Adolf I. von Saffenberg, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen nel 1136, nel Limbourg, Liegi, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1146, nel Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Saffenbergが1105年1月1日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンレジエルングスベズイルク クoルンで生まれた時，父Adolf I. von Saffenbergは18歳，母Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötzは9歳であった。1136年にベルギーリeッジリンボウルグでHendrik II van Limburg-Aarlenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1146年1月7日にオランダリンブルグで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Saffenberg(이)가 1105년 1월 1일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 레기런그스베지르크 ko에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adolf I. von Saffenberg(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1136년 벨기에 리e지 림보우르그에서 Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1146년 1월 7일 네덜란드 림버그에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 JAN 1105–7 January 1146: 1 de janeiro de 1105–7 de janeiro de 1146
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Saffenberg nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1105, em Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Adolf I. von Saffenberg, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen em 1136, em Limbourg, Liège, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1146, em Limburgo, Países Baixos, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Saffenberg родилась 1 января 1105 г. в местности региирунгсбезирк кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Adolf I. von Saffenberg было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen в 1136 г. в местности лимбург, лиeдж, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 января 1146 г. в местности лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 41 год.

es.1 JAN 1105–7 January 1146: 1 de enero de 1105–7 de enero de 1146
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Saffenberg nació el 1 de enero de 1105, en Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Adolf I. von Saffenberg, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margarethe von Schwarzenburg und Rötz, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Hendrik II van Limburg-Aarlen en 1136, en Limbourg, Lieja, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1146, en Limburg, Países Bajos, a la edad de 41 años.
